differentiation_from_pass_1.nav_location: TOP BAR (pass-1 uses fixed LEFT RAIL)
differentiation_from_pass_1.nav_type: Stamp badges with circled numbers (pass-1 uses stacked button list)
differentiation_from_pass_1.layout: Irregular masonry / newspaper columns (pass-1 uses single-column stack)
differentiation_from_pass_1.content_style: Broadsheet / manifesto / editorial (pass-1 uses monolithic slab panels)
differentiation_from_pass_1.class_prefix: broadsheet-*, stamp-*, classified-*, notice-*, legal-* (pass-1 uses left-rail, stat-card, view-*)
differentiation_from_pass_1.html_structure: masthead + stamp-nav + broadsheet-content (pass-1 uses left-rail + content-area)
differentiation_from_pass_1.typography: Pull-quotes, oversized index numbers, editorial section markers (pass-1 uses flat headings)
differentiation_from_pass_1.special_elements: Page folios, dispatch items, classified ads, TOC with dot leaders, ink stamps, legal forms

views.description: Broadsheet front page - headline stats, pull-quotes, dispatch feed
Magazine index page - editorial entries with large index numbers and category stamps
Newspaper editorial desk - TOC column (narrow left), article content (wide right)
Newspaper classified columns - 4 columns with masthead headers and classified ad cards
Blueprint/schematic - ruled grid canvas with stamp-pad toolbar ribbon
Technical diagram - entity boxes with thick borders, monospace field specs, relation lines
Table of contents - dot leaders, fake page numbers, hierarchical indentation via left border
Manifesto wall - pinned notice cards with ink stamps, priority colors, tag labels
Typewriter correspondence - monospace messages, ruled separators, indent left/right
Government/legal form - article-numbered sections, heavy underlines, toggle checkbox stamps

navigation.keyboard_shortcuts: Number keys 1-9 and 0 map to views
